meta.title: WanderMood — Plan your perfect day
meta.description: Tell Moody how you're feeling — he'll plan your perfect day. Mood-based plans for your city, weather-aware, no endless scrolling.

home.how1p:
Pick from 12 moods or just type how you feel.
Moody also gets "I don't know yet."
home.how2p:
He asks, adjusts when something's off, and
remembers what you said earlier.
No form. Just conversation.
home.how3p:
Morning, afternoon, evening — Moody fills the slots.
Change what's off or ask for something different.
Your day is ready before you leave.
home.how4p:
Open place details, save favorites, navigate
when you're ready.
Everything in one place.
home.featMoodyH2: A friend who knows the city.
home.featMoodyB: Tell Moody what you're in the mood for — calm, spontaneous, cosy, or full of energy. He turns how you feel straight into places, plans, and ideas that fit your day.
home.featDayB: From morning coffee to your evening out: Moody lays your day out on one clear timeline. You choose what stays, what gets swapped, and where you're headed next.
home.featExploreB: Discover cafés, restaurants, culture, nature, and spur-of-the-moment plans based on your vibe. Save what you like, drop it into your day, or ask Moody for something that fits better.
home.mmSub: Plan together without endless back-and-forth. You both pick a mood and Moody finds the overlap — so you get one plan that works for both of you.
home.moodsIntro: Pick a vibe and discover places that actually match it.
home.b2bSub:
WanderMood users open the app with intent.
They have a mood. They want a plan.
Your venue can be part of it.
home.b2bBul1: Visible in Explore for matching moods
home.dlSubL2: Let him take it from there.

hero.titleEm: Get a day that actually fits.
hero.sub: No endless scrolling. No random lists. WanderMood turns your vibe into places, plans, and little city moments worth leaving the house for.

proof.line: Built for spontaneous city days — solo plans, friends, and travelers.

why.title: Mood first.
why.sub: You don't start with a category search. You start with how you feel — and the app builds from there.
why.u1b: Pick how you feel. Moody shapes suggestions around that — not around whatever's trending.
why.u2b: Ask for a cozy café, a full day plan, or a swap when something doesn't land. Like texting a friend who knows the city.
why.u3b: Morning, afternoon, evening — a real timeline you can follow, tweak, or rebuild in a tap.
why.u4b: Browse places by mood, distance, and vibe. Save spots, add them to your day, or ask Moody for a better match.
why.u5b: Planning with someone else? Lock in both moods and let Moody find the overlap.
why.u6b: Keep places you love, schedule them in My Plans, and navigate when you're ready to go.
why.swipeHint: Swipe sideways to browse each feature

exploreSect.title: Discovery that matches
exploreSect.sub: WanderMood isn't only a planner — it's a way to see your city through the lens of how you feel.

exploreSect.b2: Cafés, food, culture, nature, hidden spots, and things to do

phone.bubble: Hey! I planned your whole afternoon. You're welcome 😌
phone.card1Desc: No noise, good matcha, nobody bothering you 🍵
phone.card2Desc: Pick a bench, watch the water 🌿

how.sub: Moody is your city-savvy best friend. Tell him how you're feeling. He handles everything else.
how.step1Body: One tap. No forms. Just pick how you're feeling right now — relaxed, foodie, adventurous, whatever.
how.step1Moody: "So… what kind of day are we having?"
how.step2Body: Moody picks three places — morning, afternoon, evening — based on your mood, the weather, and your city.
how.step2Moody: "Give me a second… putting something together for you"
how.step3Title: Go. I picked these for you.
how.step3Body: Navigate directly, add to your day, or ask Moody for something different. Your city, your way.

b2b.desc1: WanderMood isn't banner noise. Users open the app with intent — they want a plan, a place, or a mood match. Your venue can show up in Explore, in Moody's day plans, and when the vibe lines up.
b2b.desc2: Mood and timing matter more than impressions. That's smarter discovery for cafés, culture, experiences, and stays — with monthly insights, not guesswork.
b2b.f1: Featured in Moody's day plans for your city
b2b.f2: Prioritised in Explore for matching moods
b2b.f3: Monthly report: views, taps, and confirmed visits

cta.sub: Your city is waiting. Tell Moody your mood and let him take it from there.

mockups.freeTimeLabel: Maybe fun in your free time

mockups.moodyMsg3: Then I know exactly where to send you 💚
mockups.moodyPlaceQuote: Flat white, good light, no rush.
mockups.mmMoodyTyping: I found places that work for both of you 💚

privacy.metaDescription: How WanderMood handles your data and how to delete your account.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: WanderMood (“we”) respects your privacy. We collect only the information needed to run the app, personalize your day plans, and keep your account secure.
privacy.p2: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Data is sent over encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS) between the app and our services.
privacy.p3: You can request deletion of your account and associated personal data at any time. See the
privacy.p3After: page for step-by-step instructions, what we remove, and how to contact us if you cannot use the app.
privacy.p4: Categories of data we process include: account and profile information (e.g. email, display name, preferences you choose); approximate location when you allow it (for nearby places and weather); mood and planning choices you enter; content you create (e.g. saved places, plans, social posts); technical data such as device type and app diagnostics needed to operate the service.
privacy.p5: AI features (e.g. Moody chat and recommendations) send your prompts and relevant context to our backend (Supabase Edge Functions). Messages may be processed by model providers (e.g. OpenAI) under our instructions to generate replies. Do not send health data or passwords in chat.
privacy.p6: Processors and infrastructure: we use Supabase (EU or configured regions) for authentication, database, and storage; Vercel for this website; and map/weather/places providers where you use those features. Their processing is governed by our agreements and their privacy policies.
privacy.p7: This website uses only essential cookies and similar technologies needed to run the site (e.g. language preference). If we add analytics or marketing cookies later, we will update this policy and, where required, ask for your consent before non-essential cookies are set.
privacy.p8: European privacy rights (including GDPR): you may request access, correction, portability, or deletion of your personal data, and object to or restrict certain processing where applicable. Contact us at the email below; you may also lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

consent.banner: We use essential cookies to run this site (e.g. remember your language). We do not use advertising cookies on this page. See our Privacy policy for details.

terms.metaDescription: Terms governing use of the WanderMood mobile app and related services.
terms.title: Terms of service
terms.p1: By downloading or using WanderMood, you agree to these terms and to our Privacy policy. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.p2: WanderMood provides mood-based day planning, place discovery, and related social features. You are responsible for safeguarding your account and for content you post. You must not misuse the service, attempt to access others’ data without permission, or use the app in violation of applicable law.
terms.p3: The app and its content are provided “as available.” We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features, or update these terms, and will reflect material changes on this page where required.
terms.p4: Questions about these terms? Email us at

accountDeletion.metaDescription: How to delete your WanderMood account and associated data, in line with Google Play requirements.
accountDeletion.title: Delete your WanderMood account
accountDeletion.subtitle: This page explains how to permanently delete your account and personal data for the WanderMood mobile app (Android & iOS).
accountDeletion.sectionAppIntro: If you can open WanderMood on your phone or tablet:
accountDeletion.step1: Sign in with the account you want to remove.
accountDeletion.step2: Open the More tab (⋯) in the bottom navigation, then open Settings (or your profile / settings area).
accountDeletion.step3: Scroll to the danger zone and tap Delete account.
accountDeletion.step4: Type DELETE when asked, confirm in the dialog, and wait until the app confirms your account was deleted.
accountDeletion.sectionEmailBody: If you cannot use the app (for example you lost access to your device), email us from the address linked to your WanderMood account:
accountDeletion.sectionEmailAfter: Use the subject line “Account deletion” and include the email address you used to register. We may ask for reasonable information to verify that the request is yours before we delete the account.
accountDeletion.sectionDataIntro: When you complete in-app deletion, WanderMood removes your login and associated app data, including for example:
accountDeletion.dataItem2: Saved activities, mood entries, travel plans, and saved places
accountDeletion.dataItem3: Social data tied to you (such as likes, comments, friendships, and diary entries you created)
accountDeletion.dataItem4: Achievements, notification settings, sessions, and other account-related records stored in our backend
accountDeletion.sectionRetainBody: We may retain certain information for a limited time where required by law, for security or fraud prevention, or in encrypted backups until they expire. We do not use retained data to market to you after deletion.

meta.title: WanderMood for partners — be found when the mood fits
meta.description: List your venue on WanderMood. Reach people when they're in the mood for what you offer — not when they're comparing tabs.

hero.title:
Your best guests
don't search.
They feel.
hero.sub:
WanderMood reaches people at the moment they're in the mood — for exactly what you offer.
Not by searching. By feeling.

insight.col1Label: users have no plan when they open the app
insight.col2Label: from feeling to decision — Moody bridges that
insight.col3Label: bidding competition — you appear based on match, not budget

who.title: Who is WanderMood Business for?
who.card1Body: Reach guests already in the mood for your vibe. Not people comparing — people ready to go.
who.card2Body: Appear in the day plan of someone who feels cultural or curious today. At the moment it matters.
who.card3Body: Get recommended to travelers who choose deliberately — not the cheapest option, but the right experience.
who.card4Body: Your experience fits a specific mood. We connect you with people looking for exactly that today.

how.title: From application to guests — without the hassle.
how.step1Body: Fill in the form. We review your venue personally — this isn't an automated system. Quality over quantity.
how.step2Body: We connect your venue to the app based on your moods and style. You don't have to configure anything. We handle it.
how.step3Body: Users with the right mood see you in Explore, in Moody's day plans, and sometimes even in a personal conversation with Moody.

what.title: What do you get?
what.card1Body: You choose which vibes you appear for. Cozy, romantic, adventurous — you decide.
what.card2Body: Not just a search result. Moody weaves your venue into a user's complete day plan.
what.card3Body: On the 1st of every month you automatically get your numbers: views, taps, visits, offers used.
what.card4Body: You appear based on fit — not based on who pays the most.
what.card5Body: First partners get a 'New in Rotterdam' badge — extra visibility in the first 30 days.
what.card6Body: No dashboard to learn. No settings to manage. Email us, we make the change.
what.pricingLockIn: Join now and never pay more than this — even when we raise our prices later.
what.p1: Visible for matching moods in Explore
what.p2: Featured in Moody's personal day plans
what.p4: Founding partner badge for the first 30 days
what.priceTrust: 🔒 Secure via Stripe · No charges for 30 days · Cancel anytime before then

partners.honest: WanderMood is active in Rotterdam and growing. You're one of the first partners — that means less competition, more visibility, and the founding partner rate forever.

form.title: Apply as a partner
form.sub: We'll be in touch within 3 business days.
form.googleMaps: Google Maps link of your venue (optional)
form.googleMapsHelp: Helps us find your venue faster.
form.offerPh: Briefly describe what makes your venue unique…
form.moodsHelp: Users with these moods will see you first.
form.gdprBefore: I agree to the processing of my data by WanderMood. Read our
form.successBody: We'll be in touch within 3 business days at {email}.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again or email info@wandermood.com

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How many users does WanderMood have?
faq.a1: We're actively growing in Rotterdam. You're one of the first partners — that means building visibility now while competition is minimal. Early adopters always win.
faq.q2: How does the 30-day free trial work?
faq.a2: After your application is approved, your venue is connected to the app. The first 30 days are free. Then you decide whether to continue for €79 per month.
faq.q3: Do I need to set things up myself?
faq.a3: No. We connect your venue to the app, set up your moods and profile, and send you your numbers every month. If you want something changed, send an email. We handle it within 24 hours.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes. No contract, no notice period. You just stop.
faq.q5: How do I appear in Moody's recommendations?
faq.a5: Users choose a mood in the app — cozy, romantic, adventurous, etc. When your venue fits that mood, Moody surfaces you in Explore and in the day plan. Sometimes Moody even mentions you personally in a conversation with the user.
faq.q6: Do I get analytics about my listing?
faq.a6: Yes. On the 1st of every month you automatically receive an email with your numbers: views, taps, offer redemptions and check-ins.

final.title: Ready to be found?
final.sub:
The first 30 days are free.
You only need to give your name and venue now.

modal.trialReassurance: 🔒 Secure via Stripe · No charge now · Cancel free before {date}

inclusion.title: Filters & inclusivity
inclusion.help: Users can filter on these in the app. Select everything that applies.

venue.optionalVenueSectionHelp: Expand to add opening hours, your website, or Instagram — all optional.
venue.openingHoursHelp: Set open days and times. Leave all off if you prefer not to share.

details.phoneHelp: Only for direct communication from WanderMood. Never shared with third parties.
details.kvkHelp: 8-digit Chamber of Commerce number if you have one. Verify at kvk.nl
details.billingNamePh: Only if different from venue name
details.billingNameHelp: The name that appears on invoices.
details.vatHelp: Required for invoicing and tax compliance.

final.offerPh: Briefly describe what makes your venue unique — specialty coffee, local artists, weekend brunch, tours…
final.why: Why is WanderMood a fit for you?
final.whyPh: What vibe do you want to convey? Who are your ideal guests? What makes your place special for people seeking something that matches their mood?
final.whyHelp: This helps us set up your listing. No essay — 2–3 sentences is enough.
final.moodsHelp: Select at least 1. Users with these moods see you first.
final.gdprBefore: I agree to the processing of my data by WanderMood as described in the
final.gdprAfter: . I understand that after the 30-day trial I will be billed €79/month unless I cancel.
final.pricingConsent: I understand that on the next page I will enter my payment details. I will only be charged after the trial ends.
